tasks.description: Add standard Psochic Hegemony navbar to the Trump_Hegemony_Visualization.html via build_trump_map.py
Fix horizontal scrolling issue on mobile for the Trump Hegemony Map
logs: [2026-02-26T09:41:36.471485] Lesson learned: When making container changes on desktop, always visualize how padding math conflicts with explicitly defined viewport sizes or grid items (like long unbreaking text) on a 320px mobile constraint. Ensure grid uses auto-fit minmax and canvas uses width: 100%.
lessons_learned: When making container changes on desktop, always visualize how padding math conflicts with explicitly defined viewport sizes or grid items (like long unbreaking text) on a 320px mobile constraint. Ensure grid uses auto-fit minmax and canvas uses width: 100%.

tasks.description: Refactoring Plane table layouts to a 2-row responsive design in generate_trump_site.py
logs: [2026-02-26T09:49:13.003361] Lesson learned: When rewriting Python strings that generate HTML tables, avoid string interpolation on dictionary keys that might not exist in that scope (e.g. relying on a 'name' key when only 'bg' and 'text' exist). Using default UI colors for borders prevents KeyErrors during generation.
lessons_learned: When rewriting Python strings that generate HTML tables, avoid string interpolation on dictionary keys that might not exist in that scope (e.g. relying on a 'name' key when only 'bg' and 'text' exist). Using default UI colors for borders prevents KeyErrors during generation.
